channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Loose rotten cover on storm drain, 11th May
item.description:
On Norwood Road, Cheltenham, opposite white single story building adjacent to Paul Malvern Furniture Restoration. In front of brown brick wall.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lidl trolley dumped miles from Lidl, 11th May
item.description:
Trolley has been here for a few days, too far to Lidl to take it back on foot

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 85, New Street, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Manhole with tarmac missing around it, 11th May
item.description:
Manhole at junction of Back Lane & Cowl Lane. Heavy traffic makes building vibrate

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cowl Lane, Winchcombe, Winchcombe, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Western end, the first tread before the bridge is completely rotten, one side of the bridge support is rotten so it leans sideways. I have temporarily cleared vegetation from the handrail so you can hold it and keep to the safe side., 11th May
item.description:
Far Stanley Farm

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Prescott, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The road surface on Hales Close is wearing down to the concrete base which makes it difficult for cars and especially bikes to negotiate, 11th May
item.description:
In places the road surface on Hales Close is wearing down to the concrete base which makes it difficult for cars and especially bikes to negotiate. Please can the gaps in the tarmac be filled.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 9, Hales Close, Battledown, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The section of pavement outside the drives of 12 and 14 Foxgrove Drive are badly degraded, 11th May
item.description:
The sections of pavement outside the drives of 12 and 14 Foxgrove Drive are badly degraded. The tarmac is completely worn away and the surface is loose stones/gravel.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Foxgrove Drive, Battledown, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.title: Significant Road Sinkage, 11th May
item.description:
Significant Road Sinkage just after roundabout. Pulling vehicle steering.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Innsworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dislodged kerbstone Pittville Circus Rd, by crossing near Selkirk Close, 11th May
item.description:
Dislodged kerbstone Pittville Circus Rd, by crossing near Selkirk Close

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pittville Circus Road, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bamboo from 1 Colwyn Drive coming up through pavement, trip hazard, 11th May
item.description:
This has been fixed numerous times but unless the bamboo is removed will just keep coming back after repairs.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 21, Radnor Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.title: Tree problem, 11th May
item.description:
///runner.learns.retain

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Merestones Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW10 Potholes problem, 11th May
item.description:
Cw pothole 900x600x40mm Rd closure (CW10 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -other CW10 problem, 11th May
item.description:
CW edge deterioration 1400mm x 600mm x 42mm Temporary closure 15min db Opposite Mead Cottage (CW10 Edge Deterioration)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other problem, 11th May
item.description:
Cw surface texture Patch needed 2400x1300x40mm Stop and go (CW Surface Texture Issue)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wrong path, 11th May
item.description:
My house was burgled, when I confronted the person in my rear garden they said they were on the footpath and they were right when I looked at the map here, so I have no grounds to ask the person who stole from me to leave my garden. they merrily hopped over the fence into the other garden on the official route. there's a tarmac path behind but that's not been mapped! mad.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 38, Draycot Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Confusing signage, 11th May
item.description:
Can I walk around the edge of the circle on the left or just the right where the line is on the map? was told by someone to stick to the mapped line. on the other line it goes off the tarmac and I got muddy shoes. map isn't drawn very well.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Keynsham Road, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole on Springbank Way, near junction of Springbank Close, 11th May
item.description:
As above. This and at least 2 other holes, in Springbank Way, near the above junction.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Springbank Way, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 11th May
item.description:
Road closure 28 day carriage way edge deteration approx 700x500x40mm tarmac parch number 1 plus x2 NSD (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree is damaged problem, 11th May
item.description:
Tree appears to have Sooty Tree Disease. Please can this tree be looked at asap. I have concerns as the tree appears to be dead, it is quite large and if it fell it will cause serious damage if it hits anyone or anything.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 11th May
item.description:
Pothole CW 300x300x45mm approx Road closure No parking cones required before starting work (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 11th May
item.description:
ENWD 15db Pothole CW 600x500x90mm approx Road closure with 15db (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet
